content.Text:
[Tue 2026-04-21 15:46 CDT] Pull accurate Google Business Profile data for these three Baton Rouge dealerships by searching Google directly via Camoufox. Also pull their Google Ads Transparency data properly.

## Setup
Camoufox: /opt/homebrew/bin/python3
from camoufox.sync_api import Camoufox

## Part 1 — Google Business Profile (GBP) Data

For each dealer, search Google and screenshot the knowledge panel (the card that appears on the right side or top of results with star rating, review count, hours, etc.)

Dealers:
1. "Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge"
2. "Brian Harris BMW Baton Rouge"
3. "Brian Harris BMW" (to confirm BHBMW rating)

```python
#!/opt/homebrew/bin/python3
import time, os
from camoufox.sync_api import Camoufox

dealers = [
    ("Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge", "mercedes_br"),
    ("Brian Harris BMW Baton Rouge", "bhbmw"),
]

with Camoufox(headless=True, geoip=True) as browser:
    page = browser.new_page()
    for dealer, slug in dealers:
        url = f"https://www.google.com/search?q={dealer.replace(' ', '+')}"
        page.goto(url, wait_until='networkidle', timeout=25000)
        time.sleep(3)
        # Screenshot full page
        page.screenshot(path=f'/tmp/gbp_{slug}.png', full_page=False)
        # Also get page text to extract rating/reviews
        text = page.inner_text('body')
        # Find rating patterns
        import re
        ratings = re.findall(r'(\d\.\d)\s*[★\(]', text)
        reviews = re.findall(r'([\d,]+)\s*(?:Google\s+)?reviews?', text, re.IGNORECASE)
        print(f"\n=== {dealer} ===")
        print(f"Ratings found: {ratings[:5]}")
        print(f"Review counts found: {reviews[:5]}")
        print(f"Text sample: {text[:500]}")
```

Save script to /tmp/gbp_scrape.py and run it.

## Part 2 — Google Ads Transparency (proper search)

For each dealer's domain, navigate to Google Ads Transparency and use the autocomplete fix that worked before (click the first suggestion):

Domains to check:
- mbobr.com (Mercedes BR) — we got 52 ads before, confirm
- brianharrisbmw.com (BHBMW) — we got ~200 ads before, confirm agency name shown

For each: screenshot the results page and extract:
- Total ad count
- Advertiser name shown
- Any ad headlines visible

## Part 3 — Copy screenshots to workspace
```bash
cp /tmp/gbp_*.png ~/.openclaw/workspace/tas/
```

## Report:
1. Price LeBlanc Lexus — confirmed 4.8★ / 1,278 reviews from Lance's screenshot. DO NOT re-pull this one.
2. Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge — actual GBP rating and review count from Google
3. Brian Harris BMW — actual GBP rating and review count from Google
4. Confirm Google Ads Transparency ad counts and advertiser names for BHBMW and Mercedes BR
5. List all screenshot files saved
I'll build the scripts and run them. Let me start with both parts in parallel.

{"file_path":"/tmp/gbp_scrape.py","content":"#!/opt/homebrew/bin/python3
import time, os, re
from camoufox.sync_api import Camoufox

dealers = [
    ("Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge", "mercedes_br"),
    ("Brian Harris BMW Baton Rouge", "bhbmw"),
    ("Brian Harris BMW", "bhbmw2"),
]

with Camoufox(headless=True, geoip=True) as browser:
    page = browser.new_page()
    for dealer, slug in dealers:
        url = f"https://www.google.com/search?q={dealer.replace(' ', '+')}"
        page.goto(url, wait_until='networkidle', timeout=25000)
        time.sleep(3)
        page.screenshot(path=f'/tmp/gbp_{slug}.png', full_page=False)
        text = page.inner_text('body')
        ratings = re.findall(r'(\d\.\d)\s*[★\(]', text)
        reviews = re.findall(r'([\d,]+)\s*(?:Google\s+)?reviews?', text, re.IGNORECASE)
        print(f"\n=== {dealer} ===")
        print(f"Ratings found: {ratings[:5]}")
        print(f"Review counts found: {reviews[:5]}")
        # Print lines containing rating-like patterns for context
        for line in text.split('\n'):
            if re.search(r'\d\.\d.*review|review.*\d\.\d|★|\bstar', line, re.IGNORECASE):
                print(f"  >> {line.strip()[:200]}")
"}

input.content:
#!/opt/homebrew/bin/python3
import time, os, re
from camoufox.sync_api import Camoufox

dealers = [
    ("Mercedes-Benz of Baton Rouge", "mercedes_br"),
    ("Brian Harris BMW Baton Rouge", "bhbmw"),
    ("Brian Harris BMW", "bhbmw2"),
]

with Camoufox(headless=True, geoip=True) as browser:
    page = browser.new_page()
    for dealer, slug in dealers:
        url = f"https://www.google.com/search?q={dealer.replace(' ', '+')}"
        page.goto(url, wait_until='networkidle', timeout=25000)
        time.sleep(3)
        page.screenshot(path=f'/tmp/gbp_{slug}.png', full_page=False)
        text = page.inner_text('body')
        ratings = re.findall(r'(\d\.\d)\s*[★\(]', text)
        reviews = re.findall(r'([\d,]+)\s*(?:Google\s+)?reviews?', text, re.IGNORECASE)
        print(f"\n=== {dealer} ===")
        print(f"Ratings found: {ratings[:5]}")
        print(f"Review counts found: {reviews[:5]}")
        # Print lines containing rating-like patterns for context
        for line in text.split('\n'):
            if re.search(r'\d\.\d.*review|review.*\d\.\d|★|\bstar', line, re.IGNORECASE):
                print(f"  >> {line.strip()[:200]}")

ToolUse.name: Write /tmp/gat_scrape.py
ToolUse.raw_input:
{"file_path":"/tmp/gat_scrape.py","content":"#!/opt/homebrew/bin/python3
import time
from camoufox.sync_api import Camoufox

domains = [
    ("mbobr.com", "mercedes_br"),
    ("brianharrisbmw.com", "bhbmw"),
]

with Camoufox(headless=True, geoip=True) as browser:
    page = browser.new_page()
    for domain, slug in domains:
        print(f"\n=== Google Ads Transparency: {domain} ===")
        # Go to the transparency center
        page.goto("https://adstransparency.google.com/", wait_until='networkidle', timeout=25000)
        time.sleep(2)

        # Find and click the search input
        search_input = page.locator('input[type="text"], input[aria-label*="search" i], input[placeholder*="search" i]').first
        if not search_input.is_visible():
            # Try broader selector
            search_input = page.locator('input').first

        search_input.click()
        time.sleep(1)

        # Type the domain
        search_input.fill(domain)
        time.sleep(2)

        # Screenshot autocomplete state
        page.screenshot(path=f'/tmp/gat_{slug}_autocomplete.png', full_page=False)

        # Try clicking first suggestion in dropdown
        try:
            suggestion = page.locator('[role="option"], [role="listbox"] >> nth=0, .suggestion, li').first
            if suggestion.is_visible(timeout=3000):
                suggestion.click()
                time.sleep(3)
            else:
                # Press Enter as fallback
                search_input.press('Enter')
                time.sleep(3)
        except:
            search_input.press('Enter')
            time.sleep(3)

        page.screenshot(path=f'/tmp/gat_{slug}_results.png', full_page=False)

        text = page.inner_text('body')
        print(f"Page text (first 1000 chars):\n{text[:1000]}")
        print(f"\nFull URL: {page.url}")
"}

#!/opt/homebrew/bin/python3
import time
from camoufox.sync_api import Camoufox

domains = [
    ("mbobr.com", "mercedes_br"),
    ("brianharrisbmw.com", "bhbmw"),
]

with Camoufox(headless=True, geoip=True) as browser:
    page = browser.new_page()
    for domain, slug in domains:
        print(f"\n=== Google Ads Transparency: {domain} ===")
        # Go to the transparency center
        page.goto("https://adstransparency.google.com/", wait_until='networkidle', timeout=25000)
        time.sleep(2)

        # Find and click the search input
        search_input = page.locator('input[type="text"], input[aria-label*="search" i], input[placeholder*="search" i]').first
        if not search_input.is_visible():
            # Try broader selector
            search_input = page.locator('input').first

        search_input.click()
        time.sleep(1)

        # Type the domain
        search_input.fill(domain)
        time.sleep(2)

        # Screenshot autocomplete state
        page.screenshot(path=f'/tmp/gat_{slug}_autocomplete.png', full_page=False)

        # Try clicking first suggestion in dropdown
        try:
            suggestion = page.locator('[role="option"], [role="listbox"] >> nth=0, .suggestion, li').first
            if suggestion.is_visible(timeout=3000):
                suggestion.click()
                time.sleep(3)
            else:
                # Press Enter as fallback
                search_input.press('Enter')
                time.sleep(3)
        except:
            search_input.press('Enter')
            time.sleep(3)

        page.screenshot(path=f'/tmp/gat_{slug}_results.png', full_page=False)

        text = page.inner_text('body')
        print(f"Page text (first 1000 chars):\n{text[:1000]}")
        print(f"\nFull URL: {page.url}")

input.description: Run GBP scrape for dealer ratings via Camoufox

Thinking.text:
The regex isn't parsing correctly. The ratings are embedded in the text like "4.6" followed by "945 Google reviews" - the text shows "4.6945 Google reviews" which means the rating is 4.6 and there are 945 reviews. Similarly "4.72,161 Google reviews" means rating 4.7 and 2,161 reviews.

Wait, let me look more carefully:
- Mercedes: "4.6945 Google reviews" - this is "4.6" rating + "945 Google reviews"


- BHBMW: "4.72,161 Google reviews" - this is "4.7" rating + "2,161 Google reviews"

But BHBMW also has a different format in the text: "Verified customers who visit Brian Harris BMW in Baton Rouge, LA rate this business 4.3 out of 5 stars, with 145 reviews" - so I need to check the screenshots to see which data is actually correct.

content.Text: The text parsing is concatenating rating + review count. Let me read the screenshots to confirm the actual values, and also extract more carefully.

Thinking.text: Got clear GBP data from screenshots. Now run the Google Ads Transparency scrape.

content.Text: GBP data confirmed from screenshots. Now running the Google Ads Transparency scrape.

content.Text: The autocomplete showed but didn't get clicked. Let me fix the script to properly click the suggestion.

ToolUse.name: Write /tmp/gat_scrape2.py
ToolUse.raw_input:
{"file_path":"/tmp/gat_scrape2.py","content":"#!/opt/homebrew/bin/python3
import time
from camoufox.sync_api import Camoufox

domains = [
    ("mbobr.com", "mercedes_br"),
    ("brianharrisbmw.com", "bhbmw"),
]

with Camoufox(headless=True, geoip=True) as browser:
    page = browser.new_page()
    for domain, slug in domains:
        print(f"\n=== Google Ads Transparency: {domain} ===")
        page.goto("https://adstransparency.google.com/?region=US", wait_until='networkidle', timeout=25000)
        time.sleep(3)

        # Find the search input
        inputs = page.locator('input')
        count = inputs.count()
        print(f"Found {count} inputs")

        # Try to find the right input
        for i in range(count):
            inp = inputs.nth(i)
            if inp.is_visible():
                placeholder = inp.get_attribute('placeholder') or ''
                aria = inp.get_attribute('aria-label') or ''
                typ = inp.get_attribute('type') or ''
                print(f"  Input {i}: placeholder='{placeholder}' aria='{aria}' type='{typ}'")

        # Click search area - look for search-related elements
        search = page.locator('input[type="text"], input:not([type="hidden"])').first
        search.click()
        time.sleep(1)

        # Type domain slowly to trigger autocomplete
        search.fill('')
        for char in domain:
            search.type(char, delay=100)
        time.sleep(3)

        # Screenshot with autocomplete visible
        page.screenshot(path=f'/tmp/gat_{slug}_autocomplete.png', full_page=False)

        # Look for clickable suggestion items
        # Try various selectors for the dropdown
        selectors = [
            'text=' + domain,
            f'[role="option"]',
            f'[role="listbox"] li',
            '.autocomplete-suggestion',
            'mat-option',
            '[class*="suggestion"]',
            '[class*="result"]',
            '[class*="option"]',
        ]

        clicked = False
        for sel in selectors:
            try:
                el = page.locator(sel).first
                if el.is_visible(timeout=2000):
                    print(f"  Found suggestion with selector: {sel}")
                    el.click()
                    clicked = True
                    break
            except:
                continue

        if not clicked:
            print("  No suggestion found, pressing Enter")
            search.press('Enter')

        time.sleep(4)
        page.screenshot(path=f'/tmp/gat_{slug}_results.png', full_page=False)

        text = page.inner_text('body')
        print(f"URL: {page.url}")
        # Look for ad count
        import re
        ad_counts = re.findall(r'(\d[\d,]*)\s*ads?', text, re.IGNORECASE)
        print(f"Ad counts found: {ad_counts[:10]}")
        print(f"Text sample:\n{text[:1500]}")
"}

#!/opt/homebrew/bin/python3
import time
from camoufox.sync_api import Camoufox

domains = [
    ("mbobr.com", "mercedes_br"),
    ("brianharrisbmw.com", "bhbmw"),
]

with Camoufox(headless=True, geoip=True) as browser:
    page = browser.new_page()
    for domain, slug in domains:
        print(f"\n=== Google Ads Transparency: {domain} ===")
        page.goto("https://adstransparency.google.com/?region=US", wait_until='networkidle', timeout=25000)
        time.sleep(3)

        # Find the search input
        inputs = page.locator('input')
        count = inputs.count()
        print(f"Found {count} inputs")

        # Try to find the right input
        for i in range(count):
            inp = inputs.nth(i)
            if inp.is_visible():
                placeholder = inp.get_attribute('placeholder') or ''
                aria = inp.get_attribute('aria-label') or ''
                typ = inp.get_attribute('type') or ''
                print(f"  Input {i}: placeholder='{placeholder}' aria='{aria}' type='{typ}'")

        # Click search area - look for search-related elements
        search = page.locator('input[type="text"], input:not([type="hidden"])').first
        search.click()
        time.sleep(1)

        # Type domain slowly to trigger autocomplete
        search.fill('')
        for char in domain:
            search.type(char, delay=100)
        time.sleep(3)

        # Screenshot with autocomplete visible
        page.screenshot(path=f'/tmp/gat_{slug}_autocomplete.png', full_page=False)

        # Look for clickable suggestion items
        # Try various selectors for the dropdown
        selectors = [
            'text=' + domain,
            f'[role="option"]',
            f'[role="listbox"] li',
            '.autocomplete-suggestion',
            'mat-option',
            '[class*="suggestion"]',
            '[class*="result"]',
            '[class*="option"]',
        ]

        clicked = False
        for sel in selectors:
            try:
                el = page.locator(sel).first
                if el.is_visible(timeout=2000):
                    print(f"  Found suggestion with selector: {sel}")
                    el.click()
                    clicked = True
                    break
            except:
                continue

        if not clicked:
            print("  No suggestion found, pressing Enter")
            search.press('Enter')

        time.sleep(4)
        page.screenshot(path=f'/tmp/gat_{slug}_results.png', full_page=False)

        text = page.inner_text('body')
        print(f"URL: {page.url}")
        # Look for ad count
        import re
        ad_counts = re.findall(r'(\d[\d,]*)\s*ads?', text, re.IGNORECASE)
        print(f"Ad counts found: {ad_counts[:10]}")
        print(f"Text sample:\n{text[:1500]}")
